subcodes.first_line: O ancient companion! Thy letter was received and its contents were noted. Since the time of separation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس قدیم نامه رسید و بر مضامین اطلاع حاصل گردید از وقتیکه مفارقت حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @visitation Tablets, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution
